name: Phase1 public project status
public_state: active edge development with published wiki, clean public link surface, reviewed B3 VM evidence, and B6 X200 marker checkpoint present
important_boundary: Percentages are planning estimates, not production-readiness or security-hardening claims. Reviewed B3 VM evidence and B6 X200 phase1_marker_seen evidence are present, but installer, recovery-complete, hardening, release-candidate, daily-driver readiness, and broad hardware validation remain not claimed.
